description_long: This object represents an adult pedestrian with a slender, upright human form. The figure appears to be wearing fitted clothing, with a clear distinction between the upper and lower body, suggesting a shirt or jacket and pants. The silhouette is angular and stylized, with elongated limbs and a slightly forward-leaning posture, typical of a walking or standing person. There are no visible accessories or carried items, and the head is proportionate to the body, with no discernible facial features. The surface is smooth and uniform, with a matte finish and minimal textural detail. The overall appearance is abstract, focusing on the general shape and posture of an adult pedestrian rather than fine anatomical or clothing details.
description: A stylized, upright adult pedestrian figure with elongated limbs and fitted clothing, featuring a smooth, matte surface and no visible accessories.
description_view_0: The figure's side profile is visible, showing the elongated limbs and a clear separation between the upper and lower body.
description_view_1: A nearly edge-on view, making the figure appear as a thin vertical line with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: The opposite side profile is shown, again highlighting the angular limbs and upright posture.
description_view_3: A rear or oblique view, with the back and one side of the figure visible, emphasizing the smooth, continuous surface.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted shirt or jacket and pants
